message:
test(tui): update degraded-mode tests and add PERF-7 integration coverage

tests/tui_state.rs:
- Refactor tui_perf_degraded_mode_skips_markdown_cache to use Tool
  messages instead of Assistant+thinking, more accurately reflecting the
  memory-pressure collapse path that targets uncollapsed tool outputs
- Reduce message count from 12 to 3 (sufficient for the collapse test)
- Add force_memory_collapse_tick_for_test() call before cycle to ensure
  the collapse index is properly initialized
- Fix assertions to check tool payload visibility rather than thinking
  block presence
- Add new PERF-7 integration tests verifying render buffer reuse,
  prefix cache append-to behavior, and view capacity hint growth

tests/interactive_commands_unit.rs:
- Minor formatting adjustments from concurrent rustfmt pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
